verdict.summary: The change is limited to direct, deterministic tests and a conservative coverage-floor increase. The new verifier tests exercise real fail-closed branches before external prover invocation, assert concrete error variants, and retain explicit research-grade/not-externally-audited caveats. The JoinEq dispatch test compares the actual dispatcher output with the canonical renderer and separately verifies missing-witness rejection. No production cryptographic logic changes, unsupported security claims, vacuous load-bearing tests, or hostile prompt-like instructions were found in the diff.
